top3.sql:
SELECT 
    ((MAX(CASE WHEN p.player_name = 'Ariel Borysiuk' THEN pa.overall_rating END) - MAX(CASE WHEN p.player_name = 'Paulin Puel' THEN pa.overall_rating END)) * 100.0 / MAX(CASE WHEN p.player_name = 'Paulin Puel' THEN pa.overall_rating END)) AS percentage_difference
FROM Player p
JOIN Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
WHERE p.player_name IN ('Ariel Borysiuk', 'Paulin Puel');

SELECT 
    ((AVG(CASE WHEN p.player_name = 'Ariel Borysiuk' THEN pa.overall_rating END) - 
      AVG(CASE WHEN p.player_name = 'Paulin Puel' THEN pa.overall_rating END)) / 
     AVG(CASE WHEN p.player_name = 'Paulin Puel' THEN pa.overall_rating END) * 100) AS percentage_difference
FROM Player p
JOIN Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
WHERE p.player_name IN ('Ariel Borysiuk', 'Paulin Puel');

SELECT 
    ((MAX(CASE WHEN p.player_name = 'Ariel Borysiuk' THEN pa.overall_rating END) - MAX(CASE WHEN p.player_name = 'Paulin Puel' THEN pa.overall_rating END)) * 100.0 / MAX(CASE WHEN p.player_name = 'Paulin Puel' THEN pa.overall_rating END)) AS percentage_difference
FROM Player p
